subject: Update versions for Rabat release
commit_message:
Update versions for Rabat release

Update versions and version of parent pom for start of Rabat release

Issue-ID: CCSDK-4145
Change-Id: Ibb9ff52553bf64ab0ca0a431fabf7c7f187008f7
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdnc-apps-maven-verify-master-mvn39-openjdk21/8/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdnc-apps-maven-verify-master-mvn39-openjdk21/8/ )
